about.hero_title: The Smart Africa Youth Chapter in Chad
about.hero_desc: The Smart Africa Youth Chapter - Chad (SAYC Chad) is the youth branch of Smart Africa Alliance in Chad. It is a platform dedicated to young people aged 15 to 35, focused on education, collaboration, mentoring, and digital innovation.
about.vision_title: Transforming Africa through youth and innovation
about.vision_desc: Inspiring a new generation of young Africans to use technology and innovation to transform Africa, create opportunities, strengthen regional solidarity, and build a sustainable future.
